Box #15—Change the Look
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #7—Box #15 Change the Look
*What if you changed the color, the transparency, the visibility or how porous something is
(how easily things get through)?
We seldom see how things are “colored” by our own perceptions and the perceptions of others.
Play around with this idea. View and portray things in a different light.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
